ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_positions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job position */,
  "work_year" INTEGER /* Year the job position is relevant for */,
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing experience_levels table */,
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing employment_types table */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary offered for the position in local currency */,
  "salary_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "salary_in_usd" REAL /* Salary converted to USD */,
  "employee_residence" TEXT /* Country of residence of the employee */,
  "remote_ratio" INTEGER /* Percentage indicating the remote work ratio */,
  "company_location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing companies table */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., S for small, M for medium, L for large) */,
  "tech_hub" TEXT /* Tech hub status (e.g., Bangalore, Silicon Valley) */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the company location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the company location */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index for the location */,
  "cost_of_living_single_usd" REAL /* Cost of living for a single individual in USD */,
  "cost_of_living_family4_usd" REAL /* Cost of living for a family of four in USD */,
  "median_home_price_usd" REAL /* Median home price in USD */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_positions_employment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type_id") REFERENCES employment_types ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_positions_company_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_location_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_positions_experience_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_level_id") REFERENCES experience_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "tech_hub" TEXT /* Indicates if the company is in a tech hub region */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., S for small, M for medium, L for large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_of_living" (
  "col_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cost of living metrics */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location for the cost of living data */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index for the location */,
  "cost_of_living_single_usd" REAL /* Cost of living for a single individual in USD */,
  "cost_of_living_family4_usd" REAL /* Cost of living for a family of four in USD */,
  "median_home_price_usd" REAL /* Median home price in USD */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("col_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_work_stats" (
  "remote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remote work stat entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job position ID */,
  "remote_ratio" INTEGER /* Percentage indicating the remote work ratio */,
  "remote_type" TEXT /* Type of remote work arrangement (e.g., fully remote, hybrid) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_work_stats_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_positions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experience level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the experience level (e.g., MI, EN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experience level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type (e.g., FT, PT, FL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing job_positions table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users table */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the job application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted by the user */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume submitted by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_positions ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the salary trend */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing job_positions table */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the job position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_trends_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_positions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the industry sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)
